reason: Intimate dive into a cartoonist’s tortured psyche, genius and the agony behind every stroke.
Raw portrayal of a painter’s meteoric rise and the chaos fueling his electric creativity.
Affectionate look at a passion-driven filmmaker living on the edge of cinematic disaster.
A frenetic newsroom odyssey capturing the pressure cooker of deadline-driven creativity.
A music teacher’s opus unfolds over decades, battling block and seeking purpose through song.
Songstress navigates love, loss and writer’s block on the 1960s music scene’s front lines.
A genius composer’s rivalry and obsession play out in an operatic clash of talent and envy.
An obsessive pianist confronts brilliance and madness in a haunting portrait of creative torment.
Two chefs gamble on a single meal to prove their culinary art against the humblest of odds.
A biopic of a musical titan’s tormented heart and the love letters that fueled his immortal art.
